# Test fixtures

All data here is **synthetic** — hand-written, FinMind/TWSE-shaped records with
round numbers chosen so expected test values can be computed by hand
(per DECLAN.md: never fabricate market data in tests silently).
`prices_fixture.parquet` / `flows_fixture.parquet` are generated by
`make_fixtures.py` (checked in; rerun it if the canonical schema changes).
